stemHtml: Consider two aircraft A and B. Aircraft A has a light to drag (L/D) ratio of 15:1, and aircraft B has a lift to drag ratio of 18:1. Which of the following statements is true in the event of an engine failure?

options.a: Aircraft B has a steeper glide angle.
options.b: Aircraft A has a steeper glide angle.
options.c: Aircraft A and B have the same glide angles.
options.d: There is not enough information to determine the glide angle of either aircraft.
